<script type="text/javascript">
/*<![CDATA[*/
window.ICONS_SPRITE_URL = "/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE";
/*
* Version:     1
*
* Note: change version after edit and update it on include code
*/

/**
 * Render svg from sprite
 *
 * @param {string} [icon='edit'] - The ID of the icon in the SVG sprite.
 * @param {string} [text=''] - The text to display alongside the icon.
 * @param {object} [htmlOptions={}] - An object containing HTML attributes for the SVG element.
 *
 * @returns {string} The HTML string representing the SVG icon and label.
 */
window._getSvgIconLabel = function(icon = 'edit', text = '', htmlOptions = {}){
  const ICONS_SPRITE_URL = window.ICONS_SPRITE_URL || '';
  const iconURL = `${ICONS_SPRITE_URL}#${icon}`;

  let html = `<svg`;

  // Add HTML attributes from the htmlOptions object
  for (const key in htmlOptions) {
    if (htmlOptions.hasOwnProperty(key)) {
      html += ` ${key}="${htmlOptions[key]}"`;
    }
  }

  html += `>`;
  html += `<use href="${iconURL}" xlink:href="${iconURL}"></use>`;
  html += `</svg>`;
  html += text;

  return html;
}
window.PmTasksOptions = {'lazyTemplates':true}
/*]]>*/
</script>

            <!-- ngIf: true --><li class="top-nav-link ml-auto ng-scope" id="quick-find-external-trigger" ng-if="true" ng-init="active = false" data-hint="quick_search_intro">
    <a href="javascript:;" onclick="document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('toggleQuickFind'))" class="ripple">
        <!-- ngIf: !active --><span class="d-flex align-items-center ng-scope" ng-if="!active">
            <svg><use href="/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&amp;hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE#magnifier"></use></svg>        </span><!-- end ngIf: !active -->
        <!-- ngIf: active -->
    </a>
    <span class="top-tooltip">Quick Find F</span>
    <script>
        // ng-if="true" makes Angular insert a CLONE of this <li>, so this inline
        // script executes twice (parse-time + clone-insert). The IIFE keeps the
        // declarations function-scoped (no "already declared" redeclaration crash)
        // and the window guard registers the document listeners only once.
        (function () {
            if (window.__quickFindTriggerInit) { return; }
            window.__quickFindTriggerInit = true;

            let quickFindHintDemo = false;
            const setQuickFindActive = value => {
                const $scope = angular.element('#quick-find-external-trigger')?.scope();
                $scope?.$apply?.(() => {
                    $scope.active = value;
                });
            };
            // While a contextual hint is demoing Quick Find it holds the search open but
            // wants the trigger to keep showing the magnifier (not the X) — the bubble
            // points at a magnifier. The hint engine brackets the demo with this event.
            document.addEventListener('quickFindHintDemo', e => {
                quickFindHintDemo = !!e.detail;
                if (quickFindHintDemo) {
                    setQuickFindActive(false);
                }
            });
            document.addEventListener('quickFindStateChanged', e => {
                setQuickFindActive(quickFindHintDemo ? false : e.detail);
            });
        })();
    </script>
</li><!-- end ngIf: true -->

<script>
  $(function () {
    const observer = new MutationObserver(mutationsList => {
      for (const mutation of mutationsList) {
        if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && mutation.attributeName === 'style') {
          $.cookie('chatButtonVisible', mutation.target.style.display === 'none' ? 'false' : 'true', { path: '/' });
        }
      }
    });

    observer.observe(
      document.querySelector('.top-nav-link.chat'),
      {
        attributes: true,
        attributeFilter: [ 'style' ],
      },
    );
  });
</script>

<script type="text/ng-template" id="notification-panel-default-tpl.html">
    <div
    class="sd-notification-panel-item notif-row"
    ng-class="{
        'notif-row--unread': notification.read == 0,
        'notif-row--sticky': notification.sticky == 1,
        'notif-row--actions-visible': isActiveActionRow()
    }"
>
    <div class="notif-row__avatar" ng-if="notification.userAvatar" ng-bind-html="notification.userAvatar | trustSvg"></div>
    <div class="notif-row__avatar notif-row__avatar--fallback" ng-if="!notification.userAvatar">
        {{notification.senderDisplayName.charAt(0)}}
    </div>

    <div class="notif-row__body" ng-click="navigateTo(); $event.stopPropagation();">
        <div class="notif-row__sender">{{notification.senderDisplayName}}</div>
        <div class="notif-row__subject">{{notification.subject}}</div>
        <div class="notif-row__text">{{notification.text}}</div>
    </div>

    <div class="notif-row__corner" aria-label="Notification Options" ng-click="toggleActionRow(); $event.stopPropagation();">
        <svg class="notif-row__type-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <use ng-attr-href="/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE#{{getTypeIcon(notification.type)}}"></use>
        </svg>

        <div class="notif-row__actions">
            <button
                type="button"
                class="notif-row__action"
                ng-show="notification.read == 1"
                ng-click="$event.stopPropagation(); toggleReadValue();"
                data-toggle="tooltip"
                data-placement="top"
                title="Mark as Unread"
                aria-label="Mark as Unread"
            >
                <svg aria-hidden="true"><use href="/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE#mail-warning"></use></svg>            </button>
            <button
                type="button"
                class="notif-row__action"
                ng-show="notification.read == 0"
                ng-click="$event.stopPropagation(); toggleReadValue();"
                data-toggle="tooltip"
                data-placement="top"
                title="Mark as Read"
                aria-label="Mark as Read"
            >
                <svg aria-hidden="true"><use href="/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE#mail-check"></use></svg>            </button>
            <button
                type="button"
                class="notif-row__action"
                ng-show="notification.sticky == 1 && notification.showUN == 0"
                ng-click="$event.stopPropagation(); toggleStickyValue();"
                data-toggle="tooltip"
                data-placement="top"
                title="Unpin"
                aria-label="Unpin"
            >
                <svg aria-hidden="true"><use href="/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE#pin-off"></use></svg>            </button>
            <button
                type="button"
                class="notif-row__action"
                ng-show="notification.sticky == 0"
                ng-click="$event.stopPropagation(); toggleStickyValue();"
                data-toggle="tooltip"
                data-placement="top"
                title="Pin"
                aria-label="Pin"
            >
                <svg aria-hidden="true"><use href="/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE#pin"></use></svg>            </button>
        </div>

        <div class="notif-row__timestamp">{{notification.date | timeAgo}}</div>
    </div>
</div>

<script type="text/ng-template" id="/fa/template/browser/main" role="1" assign-to-window="0"><div class="browser-wrap" ng-switch="Files.status">
  <sdf-include src="/fa/template/browser/header"></sdf-include>
  <ul class="browser-list" ng-switch-when="1">
    <li file-entity="alias" class="entity-wrap" uuid="{{Entity.uuid}}" ng-repeat="Entity in Files.aliasedFiles | filter:Files.$aliasSearch | orderBy:'$sort' | limitTo:Files.visibleCount track by Entity.tid"></li>
    <li file-entity="alias" class="entity-wrap" uuid="{{Entity.uuid}}" ng-repeat="Entity in Files.currentFiles | filter:Files.$aliasSearch | filter:Files.$defaultFolders | orderBy:Files.$sort | limitTo:Files.visibleCount as $filesOrdered track by Entity.tid"></li>
    <li file-entity="special" class="entity-wrap" uuid="{{Entity.uuid}}" ng-repeat="Entity in Files.specialFiles | limitTo:Files.visibleCount track by Entity.tid"></li>
    <li file-entity class="entity-wrap" uuid="{{Entity.uuid}}" ng-repeat="Entity in Files.currentFiles | filter:Files.$search | filter:Files.$generalFolders | orderBy:Files.$sort | limitTo:Files.visibleCount as $filesOrdered track by Entity.tid"></li>
    <li empty-entity class="entity-wrap empty-wrap" ng-if="Files.emptyList || !(Files.currentFiles.length || $filesOrdered.length || Files.aliasedFiles.length || Files.specialFiles.length)" ng-repeat="empty in Files.emptyEntities"></li>
  </ul>
  <div sd-infinite-scroll visible-items-count="Files.visibleCount" visible-items-step="50" ng-switch-when="1"></div>
  <div class="browser-error d-flex justify-content-center" ng-switch-when="2">
      <file-icon icon="file-not-exist" size="{w:250}" class="mt-4" ></file-icon>
  </div>
</div>
</script>

        </div>
    </div>

        <div class="inner-title d-flex justify-content-between w-100" ng-class="{meta:Entity.item.meta || !Entity.item.isDirectory}">

            <span class="entity-meta" ng-if="Entity.item.meta">

            </span>

                    </li>

                    </li>

                    </li>

            </span>

    </div>

</div>
</script>

    <div class="select" ng-class="{selection:Files.selectedItems.length}" ng-show="::Files.$canSelect">
        <input type="checkbox" ng-model="Entity.selected" ng-change="Files.toggleSelected(Entity)"/>
    </div>

    <div class="icon" ng-init="icon = Entity.item.svg ? 1 : (Entity.isDirectory ? 2 : 3)"
         ng-switch="::icon" ng-click="Entity.click()">
        <div class="icon-wrapper pl-2" ng-switch-when="1">
            <file-icon icon="{{Entity.item.svg}}"></file-icon>
        </div>
        <div class="icon-wrapper" ng-switch-when="2">
            <i class="folder-fa-icon" ng-if="!Entity.item.icon2" ng-class="[Entity.item.icon || '']"></i>
            <i class="folder-fa-icon" ng-if="Entity.item.icon2" ng-class="[Entity.item.icon2]"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="icon-wrapper" ng-switch-when="3">
            <i class="material-icons"
               ng-if="!Entity.item.extension">{{Entity.item.icon || 'description'}}</i>
            <file-icon ng-if="Entity.item.extension" versioned="Entity.item.versions.length > 0"
                       file-type="{{Entity.item.extension}}" shortcut="{{Entity.item.isShortcut}}"></file-icon>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="title" ng-click="Entity.click()">
        <div class="inner-title d-flex justify-content-between w-100" ng-class="{meta:Entity.item.meta || !Entity.item.isDirectory || Entity.item.active == 2 || Entity.item.active == 3}">
            <span class="title-label flex-1" ng-hide="Entity.$renaming">{{Entity.name}}</span>
            <span class="entity-meta" ng-if="::Entity.item.meta">
                <entity-meta meta="::Entity.item.meta"></entity-meta>
            </span>
            <span class="entity-meta" ng-if="!Entity.item.isDirectory || Entity.item.active == 2 || Entity.item.active == 3">
                <ul>
                    <li ng-if="!Entity.item.isDirectory">
                        <span> <sd-tr uid="FILE_SIZE"></sd-tr>: {{formatBytes(Entity.item.size)}}</span>
                    </li>
                    <li ng-if="Entity.item.modified && Entity.item.active == 1">
                        <span> <sd-tr uid="LAST_MODIFIED" ></sd-tr>: {{Entity.item.formattedModified}}</span>
                    </li>
                    <li ng-if="Entity.item.active == 2 || Entity.item.active == 3">
                        <span> <sd-tr uid="DELETED" ></sd-tr>: {{Entity.item.deleted ? Entity.item.formattedDeleted : Entity.item.formattedModified}}</span>
                    </li>
                    <li ng-if="!Entity.item.modified && Entity.item.active == 1">
                        <span> <sd-tr uid="CREATED" ></sd-tr>: {{Entity.item.formattedCreated}}</span>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="statistics" ng-if="Entity.item.statistics">
        <div ng-repeat="statistics in Entity.item.statistics">
            <div class="file-transfer-stats-value">{{statistics.value}}</div>
            <div class="file-transfer-stats-label">{{statistics.title}}</div>
        </div>
    </div>

  <div class="dropdown" entity-dropdown>
    <button class="sd-btn sd-btn-wide-primary-32px" data-toggle="dropdown">
        <i class="material-icons pr-0">more_vert</i>
    </button>
    <div class="dropdown-menu dropdown-left dropdown-menu-with-icons file-entity-dropdown">
      <button class="dropdown-item" ng-show="::Entity.$canRename" ng-click="Entity.rename()">
          <svg><use href="/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE#edit"></use></svg> <sd-tr uid="FILES_OPERATION_RENAME_FILE"></sd-tr>
      </button>
      <button class="dropdown-item" ng-show="::Entity.$canShare && Entity.isDirectory" ng-click="Entity.createShare()">
          <svg><use href="/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE#share-2"></use></svg> {{::Entity.item.share ? 'Edit' : 'Create'}}&nbsp;<sd-tr uid="SHARE"></sd-tr>
      </button>
      <button class="dropdown-item" ng-show="::Entity.$canDownload" ng-click="Entity.download()">
          <svg><use href="/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE#download"></use></svg> <sd-tr uid="DOWNLOAD"></sd-tr>
      </button>

      <a class="dropdown-item" ng-show="Entity.item.originalLink" ng-href="{{Entity.item.originalLink}}" target="_blank">
          <svg><use href="/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE#download"></use></svg> <sd-tr uid="OPEN_ORIGINAL_DIRECTORY"></sd-tr>
      </a>

      <button
        type="button"
        class="dropdown-item"
        ngf-select="Entity.uploadVersion($file)"
        ngf-pattern="'{{'.' + Entity.extension}}'"
        ngf-model-options="{allowInvalid: true}"
        ngf-fix-orientation="true"
        ngf-multiple="false"
        ng-show="::!Entity.isDirectory && Entity.item.isShortcut != 1 && Files.$canUpload"><svg><use href="/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE#upload"></use></svg><span> <sd-tr uid="NEW_VERSION"></sd-tr></span></button>

      <button
        type="button"
        class="dropdown-item"
        ng-click="Entity.viewVersions()"
        ng-show="!Entity.isDirectory && Entity.item.active == 1 && Entity.item.isShortcut != 1 && Entity.item.versions.length"><svg><use href="/cachedStatic/iconUrl1?file=%2Fthemes%2Fmpa%2Fassets%2Fsvg%2Fcommon-svg%2Ficons-sprite.svg&hash=qhdR2R0QVhhpU_2uFWEE#git-branch"></use></svg> <span> <sd-tr uid="VIEW_VERSIONS"></sd-tr></span></button>

      <entity-action
        type="button"
        class="dropdown-item"
        ng-repeat="action in ::Entity.actions">
      </entity-action>


          </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script type="text/ng-template" id="multiFileUploader.html" role="1" assign-to-window="0"><div class="file-upload-widget sd-oscar-file-upload-wrapper multiple-files">
    <div>
        <div class="mr-b-10" ng-if="config.dropZone">
            <div
            class="drop-box w-100"
            ngf-drop="Uploader.uploadSelected($newFiles, $invalidFiles)"
            ngf-multiple="true"
            ngf-keep="'distinct'"
            ngf-fix-orientation="true"
            ngf-drag-over-class="'dragover'"
            ng-class="{'has-files':files.length}">
                <p
                    ngf-select="Uploader.uploadSelected($newFiles, $invalidFiles)"
                    ngf-multiple="true"
                    ngf-allow-dir="true"
                    ngf-keep="'distinct'"
                    ngf-fix-orientation="true"
                    ng-if="!files.length"><sd-tr uid="SELECT_OR_DROP_FILES" /></p>
                <div ng-if="files.length" class="file-list">
                    <ul>
                        <li class="file" ng-repeat="file in files">
                            <div class="info">
                                <span class="fileName">{{file.fileName}}</span>

                                <uib-progressbar
                                class="progress-lg"
                                value="file.progress || 0"
                                type="{{file.cancelled ? 'danger' : (file.uploaded ? 'success' : 'info')}}">
                                    <span ng-if="!file.cancelled">{{file.progress ? (file.progress < 100 ? file.progress + '%' : 'Done') : '0%'}}</span>
                                    <span ng-if="file.cancelled">{{file.aborted ? 'Cancelled' : 'Error'}}</span>
                                </uib-progressbar>

                                <button ng-if="!file.aborted && !file.uploaded" class="btn btn-xs btn-danger" ng-click="file.abort()">
                                    <i class="material-icons list-icon">clear</i>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <div class="error" ng-if="file.error">{{file.errorMessage}}</div>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div ngf-no-file-drop><sd-tr uid="FILE_DRAG_DROP_NOT_SUPPORTED" /></div>
        </div>
        <div class="btn-list">
            <button
            type="button"
            class="btn btn-primary btn-sm"
            ngf-select="Uploader.uploadSelected($newFiles, $invalidFiles)"
            ngf-multiple="true"
            ngf-fix-orientation="true"
            ngf-keep="'distinct'"
            ng-class="{'btn-block':!files.length}">
                <sd-tr uid="SELECT_FILES" />
            </button>
            <div class="d-inline-block" ng-if="files.length">
                <button
                ng-if="!config.autoUpload"
                type="button"
                class="btn btn-success btn-sm"
                ng-disabled="OscarFileUpload.uploadInProgress || !OscarFileUpload.files.length"
                ng-click="OscarFileUpload.uploadAll()">
                    <ng-pluralize
                    ng-hide="OscarFileUpload.uploadInProgress"
                    count="OscarFileUpload.files.length"
                    when="{
                        'one' : 'Upload File',
                        'other' : 'Upload {} Files'
                    }">
                    </ng-pluralize>
                    <span ng-show="OscarFileUpload.uploadInProgress"><sd-tr uid="UPLOADING_ELLIPSES" /></span>
                </button>
                <button
                    type="button"
                    class="btn btn-danger btn-sm"
                    ng-click="OscarFileUpload.clearAll()">
                  <sd-tr uid="REMOVE_CANCEL_ALL" />
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
</script>

    </li>

<div class="no-files-message py-3" ng-hide="files.length">
    No Files Added</div>
</script>
<script type="text/ng-template" id="fileUploaderV2.html" role="1" assign-to-window="0"><div class="file-upload-widget sd-oscar-file-upload-wrapper multiple-files">

                        ngf-select="UploaderV2.uploadSelected($newFiles, $invalidFiles)"
                        ngf-multiple="false"

                        ngf-fix-orientation="true"
                        style="margin:0; padding:0; flex-grow:1; line-height:196px;"

                        <li class="file" ng-repeat="file in filesUploaderV2">

                                <uib-progressbar
                                        class="progress-lg"
                                        value="file.progress || 0"
                                        type="{{file.cancelled ? 'danger' : (file.uploaded ? 'success' : 'info')}}">
                                    <span ng-if="!file.cancelled">{{file.progress ? (file.progress < 100 ? file.progress + '%' : 'Done') : '0%'}}</span>
                                    <span ng-if="file.cancelled">{{file.aborted ? 'Cancelled' : 'Error'}}</span>
                                </uib-progressbar>

                                <button ng-if="!file.aborted && !file.uploaded" class="btn btn-xs btn-danger" ng-click="file.abort()">
                                    <i class="material-icons list-icon">clear</i>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <div class="error" ng-if="file.error">{{file.errorMessage}}</div>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

                  <sd-tr uid="PAUSE"></sd-tr>
              </sd-menu-item>
              <sd-menu-item
                click="EntityTimerAdmin.resume(timer)"
                ng-if="!timer.disabled && timer.paused">
                  <sd-tr uid="RESUME"></sd-tr>
              </sd-menu-item>
              <sd-menu-item
                click="EntityTimerAdmin.complete(timer)"

                ng-if="EntityTimerAdmin.invoicing && timer.completed">
                  <sd-tr uid="INVOICE"></sd-tr>
              </sd-menu-item>
              <sd-menu-item
                click="EntityTimerAdmin.delete(timer)"
                ng-if="timer.disabled">
                  <sd-tr uid="DELETE"></sd-tr>
              </sd-menu-item>

                click="EntityTimerAdmin.note(timer)">
                <sd-tr uid="NOTES" />
              </sd-menu-item>

<script type="text/ng-template" id="optionsButton.html" role="1" assign-to-window="0"><!-- Trigger Button -->

        <span>
            <i ng-if="!loading" class="material-icons">more_vert</i>
            <span ng-if="loading"><i class="fa-regular fa-spinner-third fa-spin fa-spin-reverse menu-loading"></i></span>
        </span>
    </button>
</div>

<!-- Backdrop -->

     class="crm-actions-backdrop"
     ng-click="closePanel()">
</div>

<!-- Bottom Sheet Panel -->

     class="crm-actions-panel"
     ng-keydown="handleKeydown($event)">

    <div class="crm-actions-panel__header">
        <div class="crm-actions-panel__header-actions">
            <!-- Header icon buttons (Copy Link, Claim, Copy UUID, Edit, etc.) -->

                   href="{{item.url}}"
                   class="crm-actions-panel__header-btn"
                   ng-click="closePanel()">
                    <i ng-class="item.iconClass"></i>
                    <span class="crm-actions-panel__tooltip">{{item.label}}</span>
                </a>
                <!-- Modal type -->
                <a ng-if="item.type == 'modal' && item.visible !== false"
                   href="#"
                   class="crm-actions-panel__header-btn"
                   ng-click="openModal(item)">
                    <i ng-class="item.iconClass"></i>
                    <span class="crm-actions-panel__tooltip">{{item.label}}</span>
                </a>
                <!-- Confirm button type -->
                <button ng-if="item.type == 'confirmButton' && item.visible !== false"
                        class="crm-actions-panel__header-btn"
                        sd-modal-confirm
                        ng-attr-action-url="{{item.url}}"
                        config="{title: '{{item.buttonOptions.confirmText}}'}"
                        type="button">
                    <i ng-class="item.iconClass"></i>
                    <span class="crm-actions-panel__tooltip">{{item.label}}</span>
                </button>
                <!-- Copy text type -->
                <button ng-if="item.type == 'copyTextButton' && item.visible !== false"
                        class="crm-actions-panel__header-btn"
                        auto-select="{copy:true,copySuccess:'{{item.buttonOptions.copySuccess}}',copyFailure:'{{item.buttonOptions.copyFailure}}'}"
                        copy-text="{{item.buttonOptions.copyText}}"
                        type="button">
                    <i ng-class="item.iconClass"></i>
                    <span class="crm-actions-panel__tooltip">{{item.label}}</span>
                </button>
            </ng-container>

        </div>

            <!-- Impersonate / Message buttons -->
            <ng-container ng-repeat="item in headerDividerItems">
                <!-- Link type -->
                <a ng-if="item.type == 'link' && item.visible !== false"
                   href="{{item.url}}"
                   class="crm-actions-panel__header-btn"
                   ng-click="closePanel()">
                    <i ng-class="item.iconClass"></i>
                    <span class="crm-actions-panel__tooltip">{{item.label}}</span>
                </a>
                <!-- Modal type -->
                <a ng-if="item.type == 'modal' && item.visible !== false"
                   href="#"
                   class="crm-actions-panel__header-btn"
                   ng-click="openModal(item)">
                    <i ng-class="item.iconClass"></i>
                    <span class="crm-actions-panel__tooltip">{{item.label}}</span>
                </a>
            </ng-container>
            <span ng-if="headerDividerItems.length" class="crm-actions-panel__header-divider"></span>

               class="crm-actions-panel__dashboard-btn"
               href="{{dashboardUrl}}"

                <span class="crm-actions-panel__dashboard-btn-label">{{dashboardLabel}}</span>
            </a>

                <i class="material-icons">close</i>
            </button>

        </button>

                class="crm-actions-panel__tab"

                ng-if="cat.totalCount > 0"
                type="button">

            {{cat.label}} <span class="crm-actions-panel__tab-count">{{cat.visibleCount}}</span>
        </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Scrollable Content Area -->
    <div class="crm-actions-panel__content">

        <!-- "All" view: grouped by category with section headers -->

            <div ng-repeat="cat in orderedCategories"
                 ng-if="cat.visibleCount > 0"
                 class="crm-actions-panel__section">

                    <span class="crm-actions-panel__section-dot"></span>

                        <!-- Action Card: renders a single action item in the card grid -->
<!-- Expects `item` from ng-repeat scope with: type, visible, url, iconClass, label, modalOptions, buttonOptions, key -->

   href="{{item.url}}"
   class="crm-actions-panel__card"
   ng-class="{'crm-actions-panel__card--focused': focusedItemKey === item.key}"

   ng-mouseleave="clearFocusedItem()"
   ng-click="closePanel()">

   ng-mouseleave="clearFocusedItem()"

</a>

                    </ng-container>

            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Single category view: flat grid, no headers -->
        <div ng-if="activeTab !== 'all'" class="crm-actions-panel__grid">
            <ng-container ng-repeat="cat in orderedCategories">
                <ng-container ng-if="activeTab === cat.key">

<script type="text/ng-template" id="conditionalLogicForm.html" role="1" assign-to-window="0"><div class="conditionLogic sidebar-conditional-field-form"

          </div>

                <select ng-model="when.comparison" ng-options="key as value for (key , value) in ConditionalLogic.defaultOptionsForFieldConditions.comparisonForSelect" ng-if="[&quot;radio&quot;, &quot;dropdown&quot;, &quot;choice&quot;].includes(when.compareValue.type)" class="comparison-field-select form-control" sd-oscar-theme-select="select2" name="" id="">

      </div>

    </div>
    <!-- End/ conditionLogic__block 01-->

          <button class="conditionLogic__close-btn" type="button"

angular.module(m).directive('html', function(notify) {
    return {
        restrict: 'E',
        link: function($scope, $element, $attrs) {
            window.jGrowlNotify = function(message, options) {
                if (!angular.isObject(options)) {
                    options = {};
                }

                notify({
                    messageTemplate: '<span>' + message + '</span>',
                    duration: options.life
                });
            };
            window.notify = notify;
            $scope.notify = notify;
            console.warn('FLASH NOTIFICATIONS');
            var count = 0;
            (window.Pace && Pace.on('hide', paceHide)) || paceHide();
            function paceHide() {
                if(count) return;
                                count++;
            }

        }
    };
});
